description: Configures trusted networks, IP allowlists, and context-aware access for Google Workspace. Standard uses no IP restrictions, Elevated adds IP allowlists and context-aware access, Strict enforces IP restrictions for all admin access.

risk_profile_effects.standard: No IP restrictions. Context-aware access disabled.
risk_profile_effects.elevated: IP allowlist enforced for admin access. Context-aware access enabled (requires Cloud Identity Premium).
risk_profile_effects.strict: IP allowlist enforced for all admin access. Context-aware access enabled with device trust required.

risk_profile.label: Risk Profile
risk_profile.client_description: Your security tier. Standard has no network restrictions. Elevated and Strict enforce IP allowlists and context-aware access.

group_ids.label: Group IDs
group_ids.client_description: Map of group names to IDs from the groups module.

trusted_cidrs.label: Trusted IP Ranges
trusted_cidrs.client_description: Your office and VPN IP ranges in CIDR notation. Used to restrict admin access and define trusted network zones.

enable_context_aware_access.label: Enable Context-Aware Access
enable_context_aware_access.client_description: Enable conditional access based on device posture, network, and location. Requires Cloud Identity Premium or Google Workspace Enterprise.

enforce_ip_allowlist.label: Enforce IP Allowlist
enforce_ip_allowlist.client_description: Restrict admin console and service account access to trusted IP ranges only. Requires trusted_cidrs to be populated.

outputs.network_policy_ou_path: OU path for network policy scoping
outputs.admin_ip_restriction_ou_path: OU path for admin IP restriction (null if not enforced)
